title: NASA space catalysts lead, while options flow challenges adtech and gold headlines
summary: The strongest fact-flow alignment in the portfolio is FLY, where repeated NASA contract, launch, acquisition, and launch-readiness items are backed by bullish ThetaData flow, though 30-day IV is very elevated. IBRX also shows bullish options confirmation around Anktiva commercialization and FDA-related attention, but the evidence mixes confirmed business progress with rumor and insider-sale sentiment. TTD is the main divergence: direct bearish news from a weak-outlook/downgrade cluster conflicts with persistent bullish call-heavy flow. IGLD has supportive gold-demand news from central-bank buying, but ThetaData is sharply bearish, making it a watch item rather than a clean macro confirmation.

IGLD has supportive gold-demand news from central-bank buying, but ThetaData is sharply bearish, making it a watch item rather than a clean macro confirmation.
